passages.passage_text: In an exhibition the timings for entry are 10 AM to 3 PM and 4 PM to 8 PM. There are 5 batches in each session of one hour duration. The tickets used for entry are coded seven words, which gets rearranged for different batches following a definite rule. Which is described below: Rule 1 (10 AM - 11 AM): you all are welcomed in this exhibition. Rule 2 (11 AM - 12 AM): at call this welcomed exhibition in you. Batch 3 (12AM - 1 PM): this all in welcomed you exhibition gre. Output (**) of the first batch.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step VII of an input is 'over the pre bone', what is step VI of that input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What will be the following arrangement? Input: 'syn reach lad photo cat' Arrangement: reach lad photo syn cat

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step VI of a given input be 'map ind pak rus eng', what would be that input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Given the following input, what would be step VIII of the input? Input: bank cris attract with prize

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In which step will we get the same arrangement as the input?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the code on the ticket of sixth batch is 'enjoy your life equally after be marriage', which of the following would be the code on the ticket of the third batch?

choices.a: the your equally after marriage enjoy life
choices.b: the your after equally enjoy marriage life
choices.c: your after equally enjoy marriage life
choices.d: the after equally life marriage enjoy your

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the code of ticket of the batch between 8 and 9 PM in the evening be 'Amit Roop Chaudhary is my best friend', which of the following would be the code on the ticket of the batch between 10 and 11 Am in the morning session?
